title: sutera pauciflora
intro: Sutera pauciflora, also known as the annual wild heliotrope or few-flowered phlox, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sutera pauciflora include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of Sutera pauciflora can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
